name: AndroidModLoader
snippet:
AML is a mod loader for almost ANY android game or application ! AML has been started as a GTA-series mod loader AND as a Gorilla Tag mod loader.
AML has been started as a GTA-series mod loader AND as a Gorilla Tag mod loader. Since Gorilla Tag is a Unity-application, AML should be "upgraded" with some IL2CPP tools that are NOT ready now.

name: AndroidModLoader/AMLLA: Android Mod Loader's Limit
snippet: A limit adjuster for Android games that may get support from that mod! AMLLA is available for: GTA:SA v2.00 (32-bit). About. Android Mod Loader's Limit Adjuster ...

name: AndroidModLoader/GTA_CLEOMod
snippet: This one allows mods made specially for AML to communicate with the CLEO. Also, it has NEW settings that you WILL LIKE! I miss the PC opcodes! Can i get them?

name: GitHub - AndroidModLoader/GTASA_Male01Fix: A fix for
snippet: This is a port of a mod that tries to fix the appearance of Male01 (the model that is used when it's failed to load any other ped model).

name: Releases · AndroidModLoader/GTASA_GPS
snippet: AndroidModLoader/GTASA_GPS . ... IamAML reacted with thumbs up emoji

name: AML: Main Page - GitHub.IO
snippet: A simple mod which allows modmakers to play any sound or even a radio! https://www.un4seen.com/. GTA (Any), CLEO, Complete, A mod which "transforms" CLEO v2.0.1 ...

name: AndroidModLoader/GTASA_MoreSettings: Additional
snippet: Additional settings for GTA:SA ! Contribute to AndroidModLoader/GTASA_MoreSettings development by creating an account on GitHub.

name: OpenAL Soft replacement for GTA:SA Android
snippet: OpenAL Soft replacement for GTA : SA Android . Contribute to AndroidModLoader/GTASA_OpenALUpdate development by creating an account on GitHub .

name: AndroidModLoader/SAShaderL: A custom shader loader
snippet: A custom shader loader for GTA:SA Android . Contribute to AndroidModLoader/SAShaderL development by creating an account on GitHub.
